19.kj: [phrase] babbler, bay, [phrase] evil speaker, language, talker, tongue, wedge.
19.dv: or לָשֹׁן; also (in plural) feminine לְשֹׁנָה; from H3960 (לָשַׁן);

19.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock

20.gl: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)

20.gl: an eye (literally or figuratively); by analogy, a fountain (as the eye of the landscape)

20.kj: appointed (sign, time), (place of, solemn) assembly, congregation, (set, solemn) feast, (appointed, due) season, solemn(-ity), synogogue, (set) time (appointed).
20.dv: or מֹעֵד; or (feminine) מוֹעָדָה; (2 Chronicles 8:13), from H3259 (יָעַד);

20.gl: a rope (as twisted), especially a measuring line; by implication, a district or inheritance (as measured); or a noose (as of cords); figuratively, a company (as if tied together); also a throe (especially of parturition)
20.kj: band, coast, company, cord, country, destruction, line, lot, pain, pang, portion, region, rope, snare, sorrow, tackling.

20.kj: alway(-s), constantly, end, ([phrase] n-) ever(more), perpetual, strength, victory.

20.gl: Jerushalaim or Jerushalem, the capital city of Palestine
20.dv: rarely יְרוּשָׁלַיִם; a dual (in allusion to its two main hills (the true pointing, at least of the former reading, seems to be that of H3390 (יְרוּשׁ

21.gl: a hand (the open one (indicating power, means, direction, etc.),

21.dv: a primitive word; in distinction from H3709 (כַּף), the closed one); used (as noun, adverb, etc.) in a great variety of applications, both literally a

21.gl: to cross over; used very widely of any transition (literal or figurative; transitive, intransitive, intensive, causative); specifically, to cover (in copulation)

21.gl: to walk (literally or figuratively); causatively, to carry (in various senses)
21.kj: [idiom] again, away, bear, bring, carry (away), come (away), depart, flow, [phrase] follow(-ing), get (away, hence, him), (cause to, made) go (away, -ing, -ne, one's way, out), gro

21.gl: properly, a standing, i.e. a spot; but used widely of a locality (general or specific); also (figuratively) of a condition (of body or mind)
21.kj: country, [idiom] home, [idiom] open, place, room, space, [idiom] whither(-soever).
21.dv: or מָקֹם; also (feminine) מְקוֹמָה; or מְקֹמָה; from H6965 (קוּם);

21.gl: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
21.kj: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.
21.dv: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));

21.gl: a channel, e.g. a fosse, canal, shaft; specifically the Nile, as the one river of Egypt, including its collateral trenches; also the Tigris, as the main river of Assyria

22.gl: to judge, i.e. pronounce sentence (for or against); by implication, to vindicate or punish; by extenssion, to govern; passively, to litigate (literally or figuratively)
22.kj: [phrase] avenge, [idiom] that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), [idiom] needs, plead, reason, rule.

22.gl: properly, to hack, i.e. engrave (Judges 5:14, to be a scribe simply); by implication, to enact (laws being cut in stone or metal tablets in primitive times) or (gen.) prescribe
22.kj: appoint, decree, governor, grave, lawgiver, note, pourtray, print, set.

22.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
22.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

22.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
22.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

23.gl: to fasten upon; hence, to seize, be strong (figuratively, courageous, causatively strengthen, cure, help, repair, fortify), obstinate; to bind, restrain, conquer
23.kj: aid, amend, [idiom] calker, catch, cleave, confirm, be constant, constrain, continue, be of good (take) courage(-ous, -ly), encourage (self), be established, fasten, force, fortify

23.gl: a rope (as twisted), especially a measuring line; by implication, a district or inheritance (as measured); or a noose (as of cords); figuratively, a company (as if tied together); also a throe (especially of parturition)
23.kj: band, coast, company, cord, country, destruction, line, lot, pain, pang, portion, region, rope, snare, sorrow, tackling.

23.gl: properly, to pound, i.e. smite; by implication (as if beating out, and thus expanding) to disperse; also, to thrust off, down, out or upon (inclusively, reject, let alone, permit, remit, etc.)
23.kj: cast off, drawn, let fall, forsake, join (battle), leave (off), lie still, loose, spread (self) abroad, stretch out, suffer.

23.gl: to be smooth (figuratively); by implication (as smooth stones were used for lots) to apportion or separate
23.kj: deal, distribute, divide, flatter, give, (have, im-) part(-ner), take away a portion, receive, separate self, (be) smooth(-er).

23.gl: at that time or place; also as a conjunction, therefore
23.kj: beginning, for, from, hitherto, now, of old, once, since, then, at which time, yet.

23.gl: properly, a failure; by implication nothing; usually (adverb) not at all; also lest
23.kj: lest, neither, no, none (that...), not (any), nothing.

24.gl: to lift, in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, absolute and relative

24.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
24.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

24.kj: beseech, (be) diseased, (put to) grief, be grieved, (be) grievous, infirmity, intreat, lay to, put to pain, [idiom] pray, make prayer, be (fall, make) sick, sore, be sorry, make su
24.dv: a primitive root (compare H2342 (חוּל), H2470 (חָלָה), H2490 (חָלַל));

24.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
properly, a failure; by implication nothing; usually (adverb) not at all; also lest
24.kj: lest, neither, no, none (that...), not (any), nothing.
